titleStmt.title: SII 19.177: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 177. (A.R. No. 57 of 1935.) KĀVĒRIPPĀKKAM, ARKONAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE FLOOR NEAR THE ENTRANCE INTO THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SUNDARAVARADA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription. It records an agreement given by the Gaṇapperumakkaḷ of Iḷamaṇḍagam to regulate the flow of water from the tank (?) for the money and house they had received from Ayyāḷaṉ-Kramavittaṉ of Āṟalūr. Two more fragments are found engraved on the same slab, one dated in the 3rd year and the other in the 6th of Parakēsarivarman, the latter of which mentions a gift of 3 kaḻañju of gold to the Iḷamaṇḍagam by one Kārambichche••••••• māra-Kramavittaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī parakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Iḷamaṇṭakattuk kaṇap
perumakkaḷom Āṟalūr Ayyāḷaṉ kramavittar pakkal Akamum maṟṟum
dravyamum koṇṭu Ivaṉukkāka naṭumuḷai kaṭippaṭṭi Ācandradāramum Iṭṭu ku
ṭuppomānom Iḷamaṇṭakattu kaṇapperumakkaḷom AvvaṇṇaThe record stops here incomplete.

parakecari varmaṟkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu ka vittaccomā
Damaged

parakecari varmmaṟkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Iḷamaṇṭakattuk kārampic�
mārakramavittar kku vaitta poṉ muppatiṉ ka
Digital edition of SII 19.177 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
